ELPAC Level 4
NWEA 1300–1400L
DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS10-HSGEO-ARA-LAT-01 | HS Math: Geometry — Rotations and Reflections | Artifact Analysis | Latinx / Latin American Experiences

The Banner That Folds Itself

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the girl mainly telling the boy about the cut-paper banner?
2QUESTION 2: According to the boy, why do the abuela's folds give you a half-turn rotation?
3QUESTION 3: What does the girl realize by the end of the conversation?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a three-part justification. Identify the artifact, the symmetry the design demonstrates, and what the abuela was teaching through her folds. Support each with a specific moment from the dialogue, and explain how that moment makes the answer the right one.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CCSS HSG.CO.A.3  |  HS Math: Geometry — Rotations and Reflections
